subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted by the Fragrances of God! Verily I read your letters which uttered your steadfastness in the Cause of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: يا احبّاء اللّه اذا اشتدّت الارياح و هطلت الامطار و دمدمت الرّعود و لمع البرق و نزلت الصّواعق و اشتدّت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Christ; Christianity
